assertion_results.text: The summary marks the run as failed
assertion_results.evidence: The output includes: "status: failed" and explicitly says: "Output summary states 'Run failed: RuntimeError: missing log source file'."

assertion_results.text: The summary names at least one concrete artifact path from the source run
assertion_results.evidence: It lists concrete paths: "run record at runs/run-example-failed.json" and "referenced log path logs/2026-03-20/run-example-failed.log" (also mentions "runs/run-example-source.json").

assertion_results.text: The summary gives exactly one main next step or says none
assertion_results.evidence: The next_step says: "Ensure runs/run-example-source.json exists or correct the input path, then rerun the manual-log-write workflow." This contains multiple actions (ensure/correct, then rerun), not exactly one.
